meta.title: Connecting Development with Diplomacy: Ambassador Karen Pierce on the U.K.'s New Approach to Aid
meta.description: Join Hudson Institute for a conversation with United Kingdom Ambassador to the United States Dame Karen Pierce DCMG on how the global pandemic is shaping a new approach to the country’s development assistance and the opportunities it could create for cooperation with the United States.
